summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Sistema PAC Acaiaca 2026. All core functionalities working correctly including authentication, PAC CRUD operations, item management, dashboard statistics, and export features.

design_issues.issue: Some form fields lack data-testid attributes for automated testing
Logout functionality not easily accessible or visible in UI

passed_tests: Navigation between Dashboard and PAC List
PAC creation with minimal required data
PAC item addition with complete form data
Automatic total calculation (R$ 250,00 for 10 items @ R$ 25,00)
Dashboard statistics update after PAC creation
All backend API endpoints (16/16 tests passed)
PAC CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
